_note: Round 5a follow-up #4 — handcrafted findings to verify multi-line StrikeOut works correctly. Includes (a) the user-reported phrase from the screenshot and (b) one additional multi-line phrase for cross-validation, plus (c) the original single-line cases to confirm no regression.

findings._user_reported: this exact phrase rendered with a single strike line extending into the right margin in earlier 5a builds
findings.source_text: Lattice's sole obligations and Customer's sole and exclusive remedies for failures to meet such service-level commitments are the service credits described in Exhibit A.
findings.external_comment: Service credits as the SOLE remedy is too restrictive. Customer should retain access to broader contractual remedies (termination, damages) for material service-level failures.

findings.source_text: the Subscription Services solely for Customer's internal business purposes and only in accordance with the Documentation
findings.external_comment: Restriction to 'internal business purposes' is overly narrow for a buyer that may need to extend access to vendors or affiliates.

findings.source_text: one and one-half percent (1.5%) per month
findings.external_comment: Single-line case from Round 5a baseline; should still produce a single tightly-bounded strike (regression check).
